title: Exploring Representation Learning for Developmental Infant EEG
description_es: Este trabajo explora métodos de aprendizaje de representaciones para analizar datos de EEG en infantes, considerando los patrones únicos de actividad eléctrica cortical durante el desarrollo temprano.
abstract: Infant EEG analysis presents unique challenges due to the rapidly developing nature of cortical activity patterns. This work explores representation learning approaches for developmental infant EEG, investigating how self-supervised and contrastive learning methods can capture meaningful neural signatures across different developmental stages. Our approach aims to enable automated analysis of infant cognitive development through EEG patterns.

citations.apa: Uclés, J., Stemikovskaya, K., Ballesteros-Duperón, A., Cómbita, L. M., Rueda, R., Fernández, A., & Triguero, I. (2026). Exploring Representation Learning for Developmental Infant EEG. In 2026 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI).
citations.mla: Uclés, Jaime, et al. "Exploring Representation Learning for Developmental Infant EEG." 2026 IEEE Conference on Artificial Intelligence (CAI), 2026.
